title: Erwin adds more shares, profiting hundreds of millions a day
body: One of Petrosea (PTRO)'s commissioner once again accumulated shares at a premium price, but still received capital gains of hundreds of millions a day.

title: Foreign brokers dominate transactions on IDX in early 2025
body: The transaction value on the stock exchange throughout January 2025 reached IDR 203.45 trillion. Most transactions take place through foreign brokers.

title: Elon Musk to acquire OpenAI, here Sam Altman's response
body: Sam Altman responded to rumor regarding Elon Musk's plan and a number of other investors to control OpenAI, the company that oversees ChatGPT.

title: JCI saw 1.40% corrections at closing bell
body: Opening the week, JCI saw 1.40% slippage at the closing bell today (10/2).

title: Net foreign stays red, with a net sell of 1.96 billion
body: Foreign investors continue to offload shares, with total net sell volume of 4.78 billion shares. Which shares reported the highest net sell?
